name: roxify
description: Ultra-lightweight PNG steganography with native Rust acceleration. Encode binary data into PNG images with zstd compression.

scripts.build:cli: cargo build --release --bin roxify_native && cp target/release/roxify_native dist/roxify-cli
scripts.build:cli:windows: cargo build --release --bin roxify_native --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu && node scripts/copy-cli-binary.js
scripts.build:all: npm run build:native && npm run build && npm run build:cli
scripts.build:cross: node scripts/build-all-platforms.js && npm run build && npm run build:cli
scripts.build:pkg: npm run build && npx pkg . --target node18-win-x64 --output dist/rox.exe --compress Brotli --public
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run build:native && npm run postbuild:native && npm run clean:targets
